name: Glaze Library
summary: A recipe book of glazes — normalized recipe, cone, surface — grouped by fired result.
why: For ceramicists iterating on glazes: keep every tested recipe (normalized to 100, with cone and surface) in one place, grouped by fired result, so you stop re-deriving the same base. Keepers can be saved to a cross-project library so your best recipes follow you into every new project. Built because scattered notes and spreadsheets lose the thread across firings.
author: Paramo Studio
